metrics.label: Years spanning web backends, typed services, realtime channels, assistants, and release discipline.
Anchored specialties—architecture, stacks, realtime systems, SaaS launches, assistants, observability.
Remote-ready collaboration with Lahore HQ—async specs, demos, telemetry, and production ownership.

pillars.title: Architecture before hero features
pillars.body: Interfaces, ownership boundaries, and failure modes are defined first so velocity does not melt operability.

pillars.title: AI with production contracts
pillars.body: Grounded retrieval, deterministic fallbacks, logging, and governance so assistants stay inside business rules.
